visuals.original_caption: Figure 1: Overview of CLI-Universe. Step 1 (Query Construction): A structured taxonomy seeds diverse task candidates; each is grounded through iterative deep research and compiled into a blueprint. Step 2 (Environment Synthesis): Blueprints are realized into Docker containers with materialized assets and verified runtime. Step 3 (Validation & Filtering): A test agent and a solution agent independently verify the task; only instances passing rubric-gated tests and fail-to-pass checks are retained.
visuals.article_caption: 图4：CLI-Universe从任务构造、环境合成到可执行验证的数据生产流水线。来源：CLI-Universe论文Figure 1。
visuals.caption: 图4：CLI-Universe从任务构造、环境合成到可执行验证的数据生产流水线。来源：CLI-Universe论文Figure 1。

visuals.original_caption: Figure 2: Overview. The pipeline consists of two parts. First, DataClaw 0 \text{DataClaw}_{0} constructs training data by extracting bottom-up factual anchors from raw multimodal data, including key frames, steps, actions, trajectories, and scenes, and then combining them with domain-specific intents for top-down semantic synthesis by a strong VLM. This produces large-scale structured data across daily life, education, embodied, GUI-agent, and AIGC domains. Second, the constructed data is used to train DataClaw 0 \text{DataClaw}_{0} models under two paradigms: an omni model trained on mixed-domain data and expert models trained on per-domain subsets. During inference, user intents are handled either directly by the omni model or routed to domain experts, yielding refined structured data for downstream multimodal tasks.
visuals.article_caption: 图5：DataClaw0从事实锚点构造数据、训练Data Tailor，再用下游后训练验证数据价值。来源：DataClaw0论文Figure 2。
visuals.caption: 图5：DataClaw0从事实锚点构造数据、训练Data Tailor，再用下游后训练验证数据价值。来源：DataClaw0论文Figure 2。

visuals.original_caption: Figure 1: Overview of Qwen-AgentWorld. Top: Qwen-AgentWorld is a unified native language world model across seven domains. Bottom: We explore two complementary strategies for applying world modeling to enhance language agents (mainly using the 35B-A3B model as agent): Decouple and Unify , where the world model serves as the environment simulator and agent foundation model, respectively.
visuals.article_caption: 图6：Qwen-AgentWorld统一模拟七类Agent环境，并分别作为环境模拟器和Agent预训练底座。来源：Qwen-AgentWorld论文Figure 1。
visuals.caption: 图6：Qwen-AgentWorld统一模拟七类Agent环境，并分别作为环境模拟器和Agent预训练底座。来源：Qwen-AgentWorld论文Figure 1。

visuals.original_caption: Figure 2: Three design philosophies of World Action Models. The columns separate the last future representation required before action is decoded: a rendered pixel future, an intermediate video-derived latent or feature, or a non-video-generation representation. The categorization is exhaustive over the WAM census and separable from the action-coupling and backbone choices treated in Section 4 .
visuals.article_caption: 图7：World Action Model的三种设计哲学：像素未来、潜变量未来和无视频生成的动作推理。来源：World Action Models论文Figure 2。
visuals.caption: 图7：World Action Model的三种设计哲学：像素未来、潜变量未来和无视频生成的动作推理。来源：World Action Models论文Figure 2。

visuals.original_caption: Figure 1: Overview of Foresight. Foresight consists of three stages. Stage 1: we fine-tune an action-conditioned world model (WM-AC) on robot rollouts consisting of image observations I 1 : T I_{1:T} and actions a 1 : T − 1 a_{1:T-1} . Stage 2: for each timestep t t , the world model encodes the current observation context into hidden latents z t h z_{t}^{h} and predicts action-conditioned future latents z t p z_{t}^{p} using the policy-predicted action chunk A t A_{t} . These latent tokens, together with positional encodings, are passed into a causal sequence model to produce per-timestep failure scores s t s_{t} . Stage 3: a conformal calibration set is used to construct a time-varying threshold δ t \delta_{t} (orange line), and a rollout is flagged as failure once the failure score (blue line) is higher than the threshold s t ≥ δ t s_{t}\geq\delta_{t} .
visuals.article_caption: 图8：Foresight利用动作条件世界模型潜变量和保序校准监控长程机器人任务失败。来源：Foresight论文Figure 1。
visuals.caption: 图8：Foresight利用动作条件世界模型潜变量和保序校准监控长程机器人任务失败。来源：Foresight论文Figure 1。

visuals.original_caption: Figure 3: Comparison of attention-routing approaches. GQE routes top- k k query experts within each fixed GQA group while keeping the KV path dense and unchanged.
visuals.article_caption: 图9：GQE只路由Query专家，保持KV路径稠密不变。来源：Grouped Query Experts论文Figure 3。

visuals.original_caption: Figure 1 : Overview and efficiency analysis of PerceptionDLM. (a) Given an image and multiple region masks, PerceptionDLM generates captions for all regions in parallel through a denoising diffusion process. In contrast to conventional AR-based models like DAM [ lian2025describe ] and GAR [ wang2025grasp ] that process regions sequentially, our approach entirely avoids the linear growth in inference cost. (b) Throughput (TPS) scaling comparison. PerceptionDLM achieves near-linear TPS growth with stable per-image latency as the number of region masks increases. (c) Parallelism scaling under a constant workload (4 masks per image), demonstrating up to a 3.44 × 3.44\times throughput speedup when fully parallelized.
visuals.article_caption: 图10：PerceptionDLM并行生成多个区域描述，并与串行自回归感知对比效率。来源：PerceptionDLM论文Figure 1。
visuals.caption: 图10：PerceptionDLM并行生成多个区域描述，并与串行自回归感知对比效率。来源：PerceptionDLM论文Figure 1。

visuals.original_caption: Figure 1 : Illustration of Reference Sliding Window Attention (R-SWA). Each generated token attends to all reference tokens (visual tokens in OCR) and the preceding n n output tokens (128 by default). Compared to standard full attention, R-SWA maintains a constant KV cache throughout decoding. Compared to vanilla SWA, it preserves visual token fidelity by excluding them from state transitions, thereby avoiding progressive blurring.
visuals.article_caption: 图11：R-SWA让每个输出Token关注全部视觉参考和有限历史输出，从而保持恒定KV Cache。来源：Unlimited OCR论文Figure 1。
visuals.caption: 图11：R-SWA让每个输出Token关注全部视觉参考和有限历史输出，从而保持恒定KV Cache。来源：Unlimited OCR论文Figure 1。
